---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
labels: enhancement
---

## What's the problem

What's the situation you're in when you wish the app did something different?

## What would help

How you'd like it to work. Specific examples are better than abstractions.

## Alternatives you've considered

Anything you already tried or workarounds you're using.

## Are you willing to help build it?

Totally optional. Just say yes/no — there's no wrong answer.
